title: [codereview] Duplicate SHA256 digest in hetero_node.rs TX/RX paths and emit closure
description: The packet_hash string is computed via format!("{:x}", Sha256::digest(..)) in three places (TX metrics, RX metrics, emit closure). This violates DRY and could lead to divergence if one changes. Suggest extracting a helper fn packet_hash_prefix(payload: &[u8]) -> String. P3. Related to project-LICHEN-14hl consistency fix.
close_reason: Fixed as part of project-LICHEN-14hl: local packet_hash closure + record methods + METRICS lists. Clean after 3 passes.
